meta.title: Serenity Spa - Recharge your energy, nurture your soul
meta.description: Serenity Spa - A premium spa experience with therapeutic massage, skincare, body therapies and aromatherapy. Book your appointment today!

hero.subtitle: A premium spa experience with professional therapies, a natural ambiance, and 100% organic products in the heart of the city.

about.titleRest: in the heart of the city
about.description: Serenity Spa was born from a passion for holistic wellbeing. With an internationally trained team of experts and a space designed in a modern Zen style, we are committed to delivering absolute relaxation for every guest.

features.title: Dedicated care
features.desc: Every guest receives a personalized treatment consultation.

features.title: 100% Organic
features.desc: Natural products that are safe and eco-friendly.

features.title: International standards
features.desc: Hygiene and safety procedures meet 5-star spa standards.

services.subtitle: Discover treatments tailored to restore the body, beautify the skin, and balance the mind.

items.title: Therapeutic Massage
items.description: Thai, Shiatsu, and hot stone massage to relax muscles, improve circulation, and relieve stress.

items.title: Facial Care
items.description: Intensive facial treatments with organic cosmetics, suitable for all skin types for a radiant glow.

items.title: Body Therapy
items.description: Full-body exfoliation, body wraps, and detox for soft, firm, and energized skin.

items.title: Aromatherapy
items.description: Premium natural essential oils combined with aromatherapy to balance body and mind.

amenities.description: Serenity Spa offers a multi-amenity relaxation space — from sauna and jacuzzi to a yoga area — all in one destination.

items.title: Sauna Room
items.description: Modern dry and wet saunas to detox and deeply relax.

items.title: Jacuzzi
items.description: A private hydrotherapy space with warm water and relaxing oils.

items.title: Yoga & Meditation
items.description: Daily yoga and meditation classes in a quiet space.

packages.subtitle: Combo packages designed to save costs while delivering the most complete spa experience.

items.name: Nguyen Minh Anh
items.content: Serenity Spa is where I find peace amid a busy life. The massage is wonderful, the staff professional, and the space incredibly relaxing.

items.name: Tran Hoang Long
items.content: The Revitalize Package is truly worth it. After the treatment, my body felt light and my mind refreshed. I'll definitely return!

items.name: Le Thu Ha
items.content: The organic facial visibly brightened and smoothed my skin. The spa is elegant, clean, and very private. Highly recommended!

items.name: Pham Quoc Bao
items.content: I regularly refer my patients to Serenity Spa to reduce stress. The service quality is consistently reliable.

items.question: How far in advance should I book?
items.answer: We recommend booking at least 24 hours in advance, especially on weekends and holidays. You can book online or call our hotline.

items.question: Is the spa suitable for pregnant women?
items.answer: Yes, we offer dedicated prenatal massage from week 13 onward. Please let us know when booking so we can advise you properly.

items.question: How early should I arrive before my appointment?
items.answer: Please arrive 15 minutes early to check in, change, and relax in the lounge before your treatment.

items.question: What is the cancellation policy?
items.answer: Free cancellation up to 12 hours before. Cancellations within 12 hours incur a 50% fee. No-shows forfeit the full deposit.

items.question: Does the spa have parking?
items.answer: Yes, free customer parking is available in the building's basement. Our reception will guide you when you arrive.

booking.title: Ready to relax?
booking.description: Book today and receive 15% off your first experience. Our consulting team is always ready to support you.

cta.title: Ready to start your wellness journey?
cta.subtitle: The Serenity Spa team is ready to accompany you on your wellness journey.
